title: lathyrus albus subvar. pannonicus
intro: Lathyrus albus subvar. pannonicus is a subspecies of the white pea (Lathyrus albus), a flowering plant in the pea family (Fabaceae). This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues and skin conditions, due to its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds. The health benefits of Lathyrus albus subvar. pannonicus include reducing inflammation, soothing coughs, and promoting wound healing. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to alleviate symptoms of colds, fever, and skin irritations.
